feedback.details: Diagram passes mmdc validation with exit code 0. No deprecated C4 syntax (e.g., ']') detected. c1-context.md:5-35 validates cleanly.

All 8 required components present: (1) llm-switch System (line 22), (2) Developer (line 8) and Operations (line 9), (3) Nomad (line 10), Consul (line 12), Vault (line 13), (4) Qwen 7B GGUF (line 15) and Nemotron-3-22B (line 16), (5) OpenAI gpt-4-turbo (line 18), (6) Orchestrator Model (1B) (line 20) and Statistical Routing (line 21).

Word count is 321 words (within 300±10% range of 270-330). Narrative explicitly references 'PRD Section 4.2' at line 3. Prose is predominantly active voice. Grammarly score and NLTK passive detection cannot be verified without external tool access.

Table at lines 37-51 maps all 8 components to PRD sections using correct format 'Section X.Y, Page Z'. User Journey steps 4.2.1-4.2.3 are explicitly linked in the third column. All required mappings present.

Line 33 label '401 → Token Refresh' is only 19 characters, below the required ≥25 character minimum. All other labels (lines 23-32) comply with the format 'Protocol: Source performs Action on Destination' and include latency bounds.

All required versions specified: Golang 1.21+ and Docker 24.0+ (line 22), Nomad 1.7.0+ (line 10), Consul 1.16.0+ (line 12), Vault 1.15.0+ (line 13). Internal systems Orchestrator Model and Statistical Routing correctly use System() notation (lines 20-21).

Lines 32-33 implement fallback relationships but violate multiple requirements: (a) Not using dashed lines (contract requires 'dashed fallback lines'), (b) Using Rel() instead of Rel_Back() for directional indicators, (c) Line 32 missing latency annotation (has 'HTTPS' in tech position but no time bound like '<2s'), (d) Line 33 missing latency annotation. Contract requires labels with latency bounds and dashed styling for failover scenarios.

Line 11 correctly creates dashed 'Trusted Zone (mTLS Required)' boundary enclosing Consul (line 12) and Vault (line 13). Line 18 creates solid 'Public Internet (TLS 1.3 Termination)' boundary enclosing frontierAPI (line 19). No internal services exposed to Public Internet boundary.

Narrative at line 3 includes all required terms: Prometheus '/metrics' endpoint, Grafana dashboard ID 'llm-switch-overview', hardware-aware routing strategy 'memory-priority' explicitly referenced to 'supplementary context Section 3.1', and 'Kubernetes Node Affinity constraints' for GPU scheduling.

overall_summary: Architecture passes 7 of 9 criteria but fails the sprint contract due to two significant gaps. Critical failure in Model Routing Edge Cases (5.0/10): Lines 32-33 use standard Rel() relationships instead of dashed Rel_Back() for failover scenarios, and lack latency annotations (e.g., '<2s') required by the contract. Medium severity issue in Relationship Label Specificity (8.0/10): Line 33's label '401 → Token Refresh' is only 19 characters, violating the ≥25 character minimum. All other criteria pass: Mermaid syntax validates cleanly, all 8 C4 components present with correct versioning, narrative is 321 words with explicit PRD Section 4.2 reference, traceability matrix maps all components with page numbers, and security boundaries correctly delineate Trusted Zone (mTLS) and Public Internet (TLS 1.3) regions.
